# Digital Summit

> Digital Summit is a touring series of two-day regional digital-marketing
> conferences across eight US metros (Chicago, Dallas, Denver, Minneapolis,
> Philadelphia, Raleigh, Tampa, Atlanta), produced by Fried Family Ventures.

Contact: registration@digitalsummit.com | +1 (919) 529-5373
Partnerships: roi@digitalsummit.com

## Pages
- [Digital Summit — Digital Marketing Community and Conference Series](https://www.digitalsummit.com/): Digital Summit is the premier digital marketing conference series to learn the latest tactics, trends, and insights from industry though leaders and innovators.
- [Digital Summit Raleigh — November 2-3, 2026](https://www.digitalsummit.com/raleigh/home): Join Digital Summit in Raleigh for two days of marketing education sessions delivered by industry experts.
- [Ticket Pricing — Digital Summit Raleigh](https://www.digitalsummit.com/raleigh/pricing): Get your passes now and join us for top-flight learning and a lasting experience! - breakout sessions, masterclasses, keynotes, VIP lounge, and more!
- [Agenda — Digital Summit Denver](https://www.digitalsummit.com/denver/agenda): Check out Digital Summit Denver's agenda - Email, SEO, Search, Google Analytics, Social, Content, Tech, AI, and more!
- [Speakers — Digital Summit Denver](https://www.digitalsummit.com/denver/speakers): Meet the Digital Summit Denver speakers. Hear the latest marketing insights and tips from leading experts and brands, with prominent keynotes.
- [Sponsors — Digital Summit Denver](https://www.digitalsummit.com/denver/sponsors): Our events are perfect for sharing your product or service with thousands of marketers craving solutions to help grow their business.
- [Venue Location — Digital Summit Denver](https://www.digitalsummit.com/denver/location): Digital Summit Denver will be held at the Colorado Convention Center - 700 14th St. Denver • CO 80202
- [Know Before You Go — Digital Summit Denver](https://www.digitalsummit.com/denver/before-you-go): We look forward to hosting you at Digital Summit Denver! on this page will find the information to assist you in your planning for this event.

## Registration
Registration runs on Swoogo event flows (e.g. /raleigh-2026/begin). Early Bird
pricing for Raleigh 2026: $895 until August 28; Standard $1,195.
